category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a network interference detection tool; official OONI guide says OONI Probe measures internet censorship and other network interference at https://ooni.org/support/ooni-probe-cli/.
display_name_sources: Official repository README title is OONI Probe Measurement Engine and CLI at https://github.com/ooni/probe-cli; official user guide title is OONI Probe Command Line Interface.
docs_sources: Official OONI user guide and install page document OONI Probe CLI usage and installation at https://ooni.org/support/ooni-probe-cli/ and https://ooni.org/install/cli.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ooni/probe-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official OONI guide describes censorship/network-interference measurement and CLI usage; official repository says it contains the ooniprobe command-line client and Go packages at https://github.com/ooni/probe-cli.
